description: Click Combo: F
Create a perfect clone of yourself to
work with as a united duet, it copying
every spell you cast.
The clone's health is proportional to your
own effective health, and while it lives,
the effectiveness of your debuffs is doubled.
Casting F again swaps your positions,
detonates Tricks  on nearby enemies, and makes
your clone cast all available Damage Spells.
If no enemy had more than 10 Tricks  detonated
in the swap, the clone loses -2000 health. However,
for every Trick  detonated over the threshold,
those Damage Spells deal 3% more damage.
 Duration: 20s

your Ultimate Meter  to 100%
